description: Auto-analyze reviews, detect trends, churn signals

items.name: Review classification
items.tactic: 5-4 stars = positive. 3 = neutral. 2-1 = negative. Extract topics.

items.name: Churn detection
items.tactic: Negative about alternatives = risky. Poor support = escalate. Track patterns.

items.name: Trending complaints
items.tactic: 20% mention slow shipping? Alert logistics manager. Fix early.

items.name: Auto-response system
items.tactic: Negative review → Computer Use replies (WhatsApp/email): apology + refund offer.
